title: Othiri Othiri Swapnangal
desc: Varsha, a Wayanad disaster survivor, escapes to Kochi to find her missing father and rebuild her life while being hunted by her cruel step father Raghavan and Chandradas, who wants to marry her.

desc: An intense mythological drama where Garudan stands as a symbol of justice, battling powerful enemies while protecting the innocent and restoring faith through courage and sacrifice.

title: Super Kanmani
desc: Super Kanmani follows Abhishek as he supports his mother through challenges.

desc: Kala is forced to marry her brother-in-law when her sister can't conceive. What follows is a tale of emotional conflict, sacrifice, and tradition versus personal happiness.
